legends:_z-a.l: After defeating Darkrai, your next objective is to locate the Legendary Pokémon Ashna has been seeking. Research for Corbeau reveals the Ruby and Sapphire Distortions, which must be opened. With Corbeau’s recipe and Hoennian Salt, you can craft the Omega Donut, allowing you to open a portal in Jaune Sector 11 to the Desolate Land, home of Groudon. You battle Groudon normally first; then the Red Orb triggers its transformation into Primal Groudon, which is immune to Water-type moves. After defeating it, you can catch Groudon and receive the Red Orb.

legends:_z-a.l:
After defeating Groudon and Kyogre, your final mission is to locate Rayquaza. The portal needed to reach it appears above Hotel Z, but only after a special wish is fulfilled. Further research for Corbeau gives you the recipe for the Delta Donut, which you craft for Ashna. This transports you to the Sky Pillar, where Rayquaza resides.

You battle Rayquaza first in its normal form, then again as Mega Rayquaza, which is shielded by powerful winds that block some damage and negate its Flying-type weaknesses.

After defeating it, you can catch Rayquaza.

Find Perrin on Terarium and after having 200 Pokemon in Blueberry Pokedex she will give you a hint. Raging Bolt is near a waterfall, go towards the absolute bottom of Area Zero and you will find Raging Bolt sitting in the shallow water
